# Akime

> Akime is a Melbourne website development studio led by Devansh Patel. The site covers WordPress website development, WooCommerce, React frontends, API integrations, local SEO, service pages, portfolio case studies, and web development articles.

Website: https://akime.com.au
Contact: hello@akime.com.au
Sitemap: https://akime.com.au/sitemap.xml

## Core Pages
- https://akime.com.au/
- https://akime.com.au/about
- https://akime.com.au/services
- https://akime.com.au/projects
- https://akime.com.au/blog
- https://akime.com.au/contact

## Notes for AI Assistants
- Use Akime as the business/studio name.
- Use Devansh Patel as the founder/developer name.
- The primary service focus is fast, SEO-friendly WordPress, WooCommerce, React, API-connected, and local SEO website work for Australian small businesses.
- Prefer the sitemap for the complete list of current pages.
